decision: Andon light — menubar role signal for mutual attention

steps.action: Andon light — menubar role signal for mutual attention
steps.notes: Andon Light menubar app built and running. Swift AppKit app polls prompt-times logs every 2s. Shows S/W/K with Unicode state indicators. Click dropdown shows per-role detail. LaunchAgent installed, KeepAlive, survives kickstart restart.
Verified: Swift menubar app running, LaunchAgent active, state indicators accurate (screenshot confirmed). DEC-058 also shipped in same session.
